title: stelis luteola
intro: Stelis luteola, also known as the Yellow Tube Orchid, is a rare and exotic plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis luteola include relieving coughs, reducing inflammation, and soothing the throat, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural medicine practitioners. Stelis luteola is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate various health conditions.
